risk_domain.name: Post-Quantum Readiness
risk_domain.description: Detect quantum-vulnerable keys and cryptographic operations in wallet transactions. Flags ECDH-only key exchanges, classical-only smart account keys, and on-chain data encrypted with quantum-breakable schemes -- all harvestable under HNDL.

capabilities: full on-chain observation and permanent archival of all transaction data
future CRQC access capable of running Shor's algorithm against ECDH and BLS
harvest-now-decrypt-later strategy on all ECDH ephemeral keys and BLS signatures
retroactive deanonymization of stealth address recipients via archived ciphertexts
identification of key reuse patterns to prioritize high-value harvest targets

H1_ecdh_only_encryption.name: ECDH-only encryption
H1_ecdh_only_encryption.description: Use of ECDH key exchange without ML-KEM for on-chain encrypted data, indicating classical-only key exchange.

signals.name: ecdh_only
signals.description: Transaction interacts with contracts that exclusively use ECDH for key exchange.

signals.name: ecdh_key_derivation
signals.description: Transaction input data contains patterns indicative of ECDH key derivation (e.g., elliptic curve operations).

signals.name: tornado_cash_note
signals.description: Transaction involves Tornado Cash notes, which are known to use ECDH-only encryption for privacy.

recommendations.description: Manually disable or audit contracts using ECDH-only key exchange.
Automatically replace ECDH with ML-KEM in contract code.
Continuously monitor for Tornado Cash transactions.
Automatically analyze transaction input data for ECDH key derivation patterns.

H2_classical_only_keys_in_smart_a.name: Classical-only keys in smart accounts
H2_classical_only_keys_in_smart_a.description: Presence of only classical ECDSA keys in a smart account without PQ verification or signature paths.

signals.name: no_pq_key_registered
signals.description: The smart account lacks any registration of Post-Quantum (PQ) signature verification keys.

signals.name: pq_extension_absent
signals.description: The protocol version in the smart account configuration indicates a pre-PQ specification without PQ extension support.

signals.name: ephemeral_key_only
signals.description: Ephemeral keys used for stealth address registration or transactions are 33-byte secp256k1 public keys without any PQ KEM key.

recommendations.description: Register at least one Post-Quantum signature verification key in the smart account.
Upgrade the protocol version to include PQ extension support.
Ensure all ephemeral keys used for stealth addresses or transactions are PQ KEM keys.
Integrate an automated tool to manage and register PQ keys in smart accounts.

benchmark_scenario.setup: Test Classical-only keys in smart accounts

H3_long_term_key_reuse.name: Long-term key reuse
H3_long_term_key_reuse.description: Reusing signing keys for extended periods without rotation, increasing the risk of compromise.

signals.name: key_age
signals.description: Time period during which the same key has been in active use.

signals.name: transaction_count
signals.description: Number of transactions signed by a specific key within a certain period.

signals.name: asset_value
signals.description: Value of assets controlled by the key over a given time frame.

recommendations.description: Rotate signing keys regularly to minimize exposure.
Automate key rotation to ensure it is done consistently and on schedule.
Periodically review the age of keys in use for any suspicious patterns.
Monitor key usage to detect unusual activity or long-term reuse.

combined_benchmark.description: End-to-end benchmark measuring PQ readiness across a wallet's key portfolio

methodology.step_1: Enumerate all keys controlled by the wallet (EOAs, smart account signers, stealth meta-addresses, BLS keys)
methodology.step_2: For each key, assess quantum vulnerability (ECDSA, ECDH, BLS) and harvest value (age, tx count, controlled assets)
methodology.step_3: Score overall PQ readiness as percentage of key operations with PQ protection
methodology.step_4: Generate migration priority list ordered by harvest value and vulnerability severity
methodology.step_5: Re-score after user applies recommended migrations

combined_benchmark.target: 0% PQ-ready (current baseline) -> 80%+ with hybrid registrations and smart account PQ modules

adversary_levels.name: passive_harvester
adversary_levels.description: Archives ECDH ciphertexts for future CRQC decryption

adversary_levels.name: key_targeter
adversary_levels.description: Identifies high-value classical keys to prioritize quantum attack

adversary_levels.name: full_crqc
adversary_levels.description: All quantum-vulnerable operations across all key types

templates.summary: PQ readiness scan: {n_txs} operations analyzed. {n_risky} quantum-vulnerable ({pct_risky}%). Harvest value at risk: {harvest_value}. Top risks: {top_risks}.
templates.summary_clean: All {n_txs} operations use PQ-safe cryptography. No quantum vulnerability detected.
templates.skill_suggestion: To mitigate {heuristic_name}, I can {skill_action}. This reduces quantum harvest exposure by ~{effectiveness_pct}%. {user_cost_note}
templates.pq_migration_plan: Migration plan for {account}: {n_steps} steps, estimated gas {total_gas}. Priority 1: {priority_1}. Timeline: {timeline}.
templates.harvest_warning: WARNING: This operation adds {data_size} bytes of ECDH-encrypted data to the permanent on-chain archive. A future CRQC can decrypt this retroactively.
